def negative_python_perf_layer_network_calls_retry_without_backoff_or_jitter():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_network_calls_retry_without_backoff_or_jitter"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Network calls. Flag network retries without backoff and jitter, which amplifies latency and load."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
